name: marketplace
description: Official a5c.ai plugin marketplace for babysitter

a11y.name: a11y
a11y.description: Install accessibility feedback loops — lint rules (jsx-a11y/vue-a11y/angular-eslint/htmlhint/djlint), pre-commit hooks, GitHub Actions workflow, and runtime scanning via Axe/Playwright, Lighthouse CI, or pa11y. Per-stack recommendations for React, Vue, Angular, plain HTML, and Python templates.
a11y.author: a5c-ai

basic-security.name: basic-security
basic-security.description: Install security processes, skills, agents and commands from the babysitter security-compliance library into your project. Includes post-install codebase security scan.
basic-security.author: a5c-ai

sound-hooks.name: sound-hooks
sound-hooks.description: Play sound effects on Claude Code lifecycle events via hooks in .claude/settings.json — searches and downloads themed mp3 files for session start, tool use, errors, and notifications. Optional babysitter hooks integration.
sound-hooks.author: a5c-ai

github-actions-cicd-claude-code.name: github-actions-cicd-claude-code
github-actions-cicd-claude-code.description: Set up babysitter-powered GitHub Actions workflows for Claude Code using anthropics/claude-code-action@v1. Triggers on issue comments, PR events, labels, schedules, and manual dispatch.
github-actions-cicd-claude-code.author: a5c-ai

github-actions-cicd-codex.name: github-actions-cicd-codex
github-actions-cicd-codex.description: Set up babysitter-powered GitHub Actions workflows for Codex using openai/codex-action@v1. Triggers on issue comments, PR events, labels, schedules, and manual dispatch.
github-actions-cicd-codex.author: a5c-ai

github-actions-cicd-gemini-cli.name: github-actions-cicd-gemini-cli
github-actions-cicd-gemini-cli.description: Set up babysitter-powered GitHub Actions workflows for Gemini CLI using google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli@v1. Supports API key, Vertex AI, and Workload Identity Federation auth.
github-actions-cicd-gemini-cli.author: a5c-ai

github-actions-cicd-babysitter.name: github-actions-cicd-babysitter
github-actions-cicd-babysitter.description: Set up babysitter-powered GitHub Actions workflows using the official harness-agnostic Babysitter Action (a5c-ai/babysitter@main). Supports pi, claude-code, codex, gemini-cli, and more through a single action with multi-provider credential handling.
github-actions-cicd-babysitter.author: a5c-ai

i18n.name: i18n
i18n.description: Install internationalization feedback loops — lint rules for hardcoded strings (eslint-plugin-i18next/formatjs/vue-i18n/angular-localize/flake8-i18n), extraction and validation tooling (i18next-parser, FormatJS, gettext/Babel), pre-commit checks, and a GitHub Actions workflow that gates untranslated strings from merging. Per-stack for React, Vue, Angular, plain JS, and Python.
i18n.author: a5c-ai

rate-limit-handler.name: rate-limit-handler
rate-limit-handler.description: Automatically retry Claude Code sessions on Anthropic subscription rate limits. Uses claude-auto-retry to detect rate limit messages, parse reset times, wait for cooldown, and send a continuation message via tmux.
rate-limit-handler.author: a5c-ai

project-deployment.name: project-deployment
project-deployment.description: Set up deployment infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud provisioning. Supports Terraform+K8s+Helm on AWS/GCP/Azure, Vercel/Cloudflare+Supabase, Docker containers, and serverless. Copies relevant devops-sre-platform processes from the library.
project-deployment.author: a5c-ai

testing-suite.name: testing-suite
testing-suite.description: Set up comprehensive testing infrastructure — unit, integration, Storybook component tests in browser, E2E, visual regression, and coverage enforcement in CI/CD. Flexible framework selection based on stack. Copies QA testing processes from the library.
testing-suite.author: a5c-ai

themes.name: themes
themes.description: Apply any theme to your project — sound effects, design system, conversational personality, and decorative assets. No predefined list: name any movie, game, art style, mood, character, or concept and the installer interviews you, researches the theme, then searches, downloads, and generates all resources. Includes all sound-hooks functionality plus CLAUDE.md integration for themed speech patterns and visual design tokens. Assets stored in .a5c/themes/ with symlink switching.
themes.author: a5c-ai

agentsh.name: agentsh
agentsh.description: Install and integrate agentsh sandbox enforcement for AI agent sessions. Intercepts all Bash tool calls via hooks, routing them through agentsh exec for policy-based command control, file protection, and network filtering. Auto-detects current harness (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) and installs appropriate hooks. Includes default sandbox policy, session lifecycle management, and platform detection.
agentsh.author: a5c-ai

dev-browser.name: dev-browser
dev-browser.description: Install dev-browser for sandboxed browser automation in AI agent sessions. Adds the skill with full Playwright API reference, pre-approves Bash permissions, and configures CLAUDE.md. Supports headless mode, persistent named pages, AI-optimized DOM snapshots, and screenshots.
dev-browser.author: a5c-ai

qmd.name: qmd
qmd.description: Install qmd on-device hybrid search engine for markdown files. Combines BM25, vector semantic search, and LLM re-ranking running locally with GGUF models. Sets up MCP server integration, indexes project collections, installs skill and CLAUDE.md config.
qmd.author: a5c-ai

claude-mem.name: claude-mem
claude-mem.description: Install claude-mem persistent memory for Claude Code sessions. Automatically captures session context via lifecycle hooks, compresses observations with AI, and provides cross-session knowledge retrieval via MCP search tools and web UI. Token-efficient 3-layer search workflow.
claude-mem.author: a5c-ai

status-line.name: status-line
status-line.description: Add a babysitter run indicator to the Claude Code status line. Displays the current run ID when a session is associated with a babysitter run. Uses a lightweight shell script that reads session state from YAML frontmatter.
status-line.author: a5c-ai

prompt-master.name: prompt-master
prompt-master.description: Install the prompt-master skill for generating optimized prompts across 30+ AI tools. Supports automatic tool detection, 12 prompt templates, 35 anti-pattern diagnostics, and prompt decompiler mode. Optional UserPromptSubmit hook auto-detects prompt-generation requests. Optional profile integration recommends prompt-master in new babysitter processes.
prompt-master.author: a5c-ai

welcome.name: welcome
welcome.description: Add a contextual welcome screen to every Claude Code session. Interviews you about your role and preferences, researches the project's tech stack and conventions, then generates a tailored /welcome skill and session-start hook that shows project status, recent activity, and suggested next actions.
welcome.author: a5c-ai

llm-wiki.name: llm-wiki
llm-wiki.description: Set up a structured LLM Wiki knowledge base using Karpathy's three-layer pattern (raw sources, wiki pages, schema). Interviews you about domain, scope, and preferences, then creates the wiki directory, schema, skills (/wiki-ingest, /wiki-query, /wiki-lint), and agent instruction integration. Supports project-scoped and global wikis with optional qmd semantic search.
llm-wiki.author: a5c-ai

mempalace.name: mempalace
mempalace.description: Install MemPalace AI memory system — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace backed by ChromaDB. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, 5 guided skills. Stores everything verbatim, makes it findable. Local only, no cloud.
mempalace.author: milla-jovovich

ctx.name: ctx
ctx.description: Install ctx intelligent skill and agent recommendation system. Maintains a knowledge graph of 1,450+ skills and 427 agents, scans repos to detect tech stacks, recommends relevant skills per session, monitors context mid-session, and converts large skills into micro-skill pipelines. Includes lifecycle hooks and staleness tracking.
ctx.author: stevesolun

graphify.name: graphify
graphify.description: Install safishamsi/graphify -- an AI coding assistant skill that turns any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. Supports Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, Aider, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, and Trae.
graphify.author: safishamsi

performance.name: performance
performance.description: Install performance feedback loops — bundle size budgets (size-limit/bundlesize), Lighthouse CI performance budgets, load-testing harness (k6/Artillery), and a PR regression gate that fails when frontend bundles, backend latency, or throughput degrade beyond thresholds.
performance.author: a5c-ai

observability.name: observability
observability.description: Install observability feedback loops — OpenTelemetry SDK wiring (traces + metrics), structured logging (pino/winston/structlog/slog), error reporting (Sentry or Datadog APM), and a log-format lint that prevents regressions to unstructured console/print output. Supports Node, Python, and Go.
observability.author: a5c-ai

docs-quality.name: docs-quality
docs-quality.description: Install documentation quality feedback loops — markdownlint for style, lychee for broken-link detection, cspell for spelling with per-project dictionaries, and a doc-coverage metric tracking documented vs. undocumented public symbols. Stack-agnostic with per-language coverage tooling.
docs-quality.author: a5c-ai

api-contract.name: api-contract
api-contract.description: Install API contract feedback loops — Spectral OpenAPI linting, drift detection via schemathesis or Dredd against a running service, and an oasdiff breaking-change PR gate. Works with any HTTP API that has an OpenAPI/Swagger spec.
api-contract.author: a5c-ai

dependency-hygiene.name: dependency-hygiene
dependency-hygiene.description: Install dependency hygiene feedback loops — automated update PRs via Renovate or Dependabot, license allowlist audit (license-checker/pip-licenses/go-licenses), CycloneDX SBOM generation with syft, and an outdated-dependency CI gate that fails when deps drift too far behind upstream.
dependency-hygiene.author: a5c-ai

container-security.name: container-security
container-security.description: Install container security feedback loops — hadolint Dockerfile linting, Trivy image + filesystem vulnerability scanning, a distroless/rootless posture checklist audit, and docker-compose lint that catches privileged mode, host networking, and :latest tags before they deploy.
container-security.author: a5c-ai

iac-quality.name: iac-quality
iac-quality.description: Install infrastructure-as-code quality feedback loops — tflint for Terraform best practices with provider rulesets, Checkov for security misconfigurations across Terraform/Kubernetes/Helm/CloudFormation, OPA/Rego custom policies via conftest, and terraform fmt in pre-commit.
iac-quality.author: a5c-ai

data-privacy.name: data-privacy
data-privacy.description: Install data privacy feedback loops — PII detection via Microsoft Presidio against source/fixtures/logs, a data classification map template (PII/PHI/Financial/Public), a GDPR/CCPA readiness checklist, and a PR gate that requires privacy-doc updates whenever schemas change.
data-privacy.author: a5c-ai

secrets-management.name: secrets-management
secrets-management.description: Install secrets-management feedback loops — gitleaks pre-commit hook to block secrets pre-commit, truffleHog CI on PR diffs and full history, a rotation runbook with inventory and procedures, and a pluggable Vault / AWS Secrets Manager / GCP Secret Manager integration stub.
secrets-management.author: a5c-ai

release-automation.name: release-automation
release-automation.description: Semantic-release/release-please wiring with conventional-commit enforcement, auto-changelog, and release workflow (Node, Python, Go).
release-automation.author: a5c-ai

feature-flags.name: feature-flags
feature-flags.description: OpenFeature/LaunchDarkly/Unleash SDK wiring, PR-time flag audits, and scheduled stale-flag cleanup with schema-validated flag registry.
feature-flags.author: a5c-ai

db-migrations-safety.name: db-migrations-safety
db-migrations-safety.description: Squawk (Postgres) and atlas-schema linting, shadow-DB apply check, and PR review checklist that blocks dangerous DDL before production.
db-migrations-safety.author: a5c-ai

monorepo-hygiene.name: monorepo-hygiene
monorepo-hygiene.description: Workspace dependency consistency (syncpack), shared tsconfig/pyproject base, turbo/nx wiring, and dep-graph drift CI (madge, depcruise).
monorepo-hygiene.author: a5c-ai

codeowners.name: codeowners
codeowners.description: Generate CODEOWNERS from git history + path patterns, validate on every PR, and auto-assign reviewers via GitHub.
codeowners.author: a5c-ai

pr-templates.name: pr-templates
pr-templates.description: Issue and PR templates, semantic-PR title lint, and PR-size labeler with configurable thresholds.
pr-templates.author: a5c-ai

branch-protection.name: branch-protection
branch-protection.description: Branch protection rules as YAML, applied via GitHub API with drift detection and required-checks matrix per branch.
branch-protection.author: a5c-ai

stale-bot.name: stale-bot
stale-bot.description: actions/stale workflow with per-kind rules for issues and PRs, exempt labels, and configurable inactivity windows and messaging.
stale-bot.author: a5c-ai

auto-labeler.name: auto-labeler
auto-labeler.description: Path-based PR labeling, conventional-commit type labels, PR-size labels, and release-label triggers for semantic-release tooling.
auto-labeler.author: a5c-ai

community-health.name: community-health
community-health.description: Full community health file set: CODE_OF_CONDUCT, CONTRIBUTING, SUPPORT, SECURITY, FUNDING.yml, and issue templates for a 100% community profile.
community-health.author: a5c-ai

devcontainer.name: devcontainer
devcontainer.description: Reproducible development containers: .devcontainer/ per stack (Node/Python/Go/Rust), features, post-create scripts, VS Code extensions, devcontainers/ci workflow.
devcontainer.author: a5c-ai

codespaces-gitpod.name: codespaces-gitpod
codespaces-gitpod.description: Cloud development workspaces: .gitpod.yml + GitHub Codespaces config with prebuilds, port forwarding, and parallel setup hooks.
codespaces-gitpod.author: a5c-ai

mise-asdf.name: mise-asdf
mise-asdf.description: Pin runtime tool versions with mise or asdf: .tool-versions / .mise.toml + CI cache + pre-commit ensure-installed hook.
mise-asdf.author: a5c-ai

nix-flake.name: nix-flake
nix-flake.description: Hermetic, reproducible dev shells and builds via Nix flakes: flake.nix scaffold, direnv .envrc, CI with Nix binary cache.
nix-flake.author: a5c-ai

env-management.name: env-management
env-management.description: .env.example linting, dotenv-linter pre-commit, secret scanning, and missing-variable CI gate that ties source references to declared env vars.
env-management.author: a5c-ai

slsa-provenance.name: slsa-provenance
slsa-provenance.description: SLSA Level 3 build provenance for releases via slsa-github-generator, Sigstore/cosign signing, and verification tooling.
slsa-provenance.author: a5c-ai

sbom.name: sbom
sbom.description: Software Bill of Materials generation with Syft or CycloneDX: PR diff checks, vulnerability scan, release attestations.
sbom.author: a5c-ai

scorecard.name: scorecard
scorecard.description: OpenSSF Scorecard workflow with code-scanning upload, README badge, and auto-opened remediation issues for failing checks.
scorecard.author: a5c-ai

signed-commits.name: signed-commits
signed-commits.description: Enforce verified, signed commits: SSH/GPG/gitsign setup, pre-commit enforce hook, CI verification, and branch protection wiring.
signed-commits.author: a5c-ai

release-please.name: release-please
release-please.description: Set up release-please via googleapis/release-please-action — Conventional Commits drive release PRs, changelogs, tags, and GitHub Releases. Supports simple mode and manifest mode for monorepos with linked/fixed package groups, node-workspace plugin, and customizable changelog sections.
release-please.author: a5c-ai

changesets.name: changesets
changesets.description: Set up changesets for versioning and publishing — contributors declare intent via .changeset/*.md files, the changesets/action collects them into a Version Packages PR that bumps versions, writes changelogs, and publishes to npm on merge. Supports fixed and linked groups, prerelease channels, snapshot releases, and private registries.
changesets.author: a5c-ai

autorelease.name: autorelease
autorelease.description: Lightweight tag-on-merge release automation using release-drafter for PR-label-driven version resolution and changelog drafting, plus a publish workflow that promotes the draft to a tagged GitHub Release. No manifest files, no Conventional Commits required — just PR labels. Alternative to release-please and changesets for simpler projects.
autorelease.author: a5c-ai

helm-chart.name: helm-chart
helm-chart.description: Scaffold a Helm chart with Chart.yaml, templates, values.schema.json, and a full CI feedback loop — helm lint, chart-testing, helm-docs README generation, kubeconform schema validation against a target Kubernetes version, helm unittest, and an OCI release workflow. Supports application, library, and subchart-dependency layouts.
helm-chart.author: a5c-ai

kustomize.name: kustomize
kustomize.description: Scaffold a Kustomize project with base/ and overlays/{dev,staging,prod}, optional Components and ApplicationSet-friendly layouts. Adds CI that runs kustomize build per overlay, validates rendered YAML with kubeconform, and automates image tag/digest pinning via kustomize edit set image.
kustomize.author: a5c-ai

argocd-gitops.name: argocd-gitops
argocd-gitops.description: Scaffold an Argo CD GitOps layout — AppProject, Application manifests, app-of-apps bootstrap, ApplicationSet for multi-cluster/multi-tenant, sync-wave ordering, automated sync with self-heal and prune, and CI that lints Applications and detects drift between git and cluster state.
argocd-gitops.author: a5c-ai

terraform-module.name: terraform-module
terraform-module.description: Scaffold a reusable Terraform module with canonical layout (main/variables/outputs/versions), examples/, tests/, and a CI feedback loop — terraform fmt, validate, tflint with provider plugins, terraform-docs README injection, tfsec security scanning, terraform test, and a tag-based release workflow for the Terraform Registry.
terraform-module.author: a5c-ai

runbooks.name: runbooks
runbooks.description: Scaffold operational runbooks — docs/runbooks/ tree, service template, on-call rotation doc, incident severity matrix, blameless postmortem template, and PagerDuty/Opsgenie integration with runbook_url annotations wired into Prometheus alerts and alert payloads.
runbooks.author: a5c-ai

dora-metrics.name: dora-metrics
dora-metrics.description: Track DORA four keys (deployment frequency, lead time, change failure rate, MTTR) via GitHub API. Scheduled workflow computes metrics over a rolling window and opens a monthly report issue with prior-period delta and Accelerate performance bands.
dora-metrics.author: a5c-ai

slo-config.name: slo-config
slo-config.description: SLO-as-code for Prometheus — define SLOs in YAML, generate recording + MWMB burn-rate alerting rules via sloth (or OpenSLO/pyrra), enforce CI drift checks, wire runbook_url annotations, and document the error-budget policy.
slo-config.author: a5c-ai

adr.name: adr
adr.description: Scaffold Architecture Decision Records — docs/adr/ tree, Michael Nygard (or MADR / Y-statement) template, adr-tools or log4brains installation, and a PR nudge bot that suggests creating an ADR when architecture-touching paths change (nudge only, never blocking).
adr.author: a5c-ai

contribution-graph.name: contribution-graph
contribution-graph.description: Contributor analytics via GitHub API — monthly stats dashboard (top committers, first-time contributors), first-interaction welcome bot for new issues/PRs, optional all-contributors integration, and README shields.io badges.
contribution-graph.author: a5c-ai

changelog-enforcer.name: changelog-enforcer
changelog-enforcer.description: Require a CHANGELOG.md entry per PR — Keep-a-Changelog scaffold plus dangoslen/changelog-enforcer action (or changesets / release-please / custom shell check). Skip-label support for Dependabot, docs-only, and release PRs so the gate informs rather than obstructs.
changelog-enforcer.author: a5c-ai

repo-archival.name: repo-archival
repo-archival.description: Dignified end-of-life for a repository — archival checklist with notice/final-release/export/archive phases, README redirect template, dependency-graph and CI config snapshot export, and templated stakeholder notification script for GitHub, Slack, npm, and PyPI.
repo-archival.author: a5c-ai

monorepo-split.name: monorepo-split
monorepo-split.description: Extract a package from a monorepo into its own repository with preserved history via git filter-repo (or git subtree fallback). Includes CI carryover script, package-manifest surgery for workspace:* deps, and guidance for rewiring the monorepo to consume the extracted package.
monorepo-split.author: a5c-ai

token-optimizer.name: token-optimizer
token-optimizer.description: Token Optimizer tool to reduce context waste and optimize token usage.
token-optimizer.author: alexgreensh
